input.user_input: Update the limitation of liability cap in the vendor agreement from $500,000 to $1,000,000.

actual: Please upload or provide the vendor agreement you would like me to update. Once you share the document, I can locate the limitation of liability clause and make the change from $500,000 to $1,000,000 for you.
